claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: This is not a production DMRG implementation, not a canonical-environment proof, not a 2D correlated-matter solver, not a quantum response kernel, and not an accuracy-per-resource win.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: A two-site finite-DMRG-style block update has been tested on the same 9 B5/B10 D5 response rows, with the same response observable and denominator comparisons.
